nasb.text: The battle became heavy against Saul, and the archers overtook him; and he was wounded by the archers.

esv.text: The battle pressed hard against Saul, and the archers found him, and he was wounded by the archers.

cnv.text: 攻擊掃羅的戰役非常激烈；弓箭手發現了他，就把他射傷。

ccb.text: 扫罗周围的战斗非常猛烈，他被弓箭手发现、射成重伤，
